name: org-weekly-report-action
description: Org-wide activity digest GitHub Action with an LLM-written narrative (Claude or OpenAI). Delivers to Slack, email (Resend), job summary and artifact.

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
